finding: `team start --execute` can return exit code 0 and `ATM_TEAM_STARTED` when provider execution is blocked and no provider bot ran. The success envelope can be mistaken for a completed paid live test.
expectedBehavior: An explicit execute request must fail closed, or at least return a blocking/non-success result, when `providerExecutionCount` is zero. The message must distinguish a state-only Team run from executed provider orchestration.
evidenceOrRepro: Fixed in TASK-AAO-0196: `resolveTeamStartExecutionLane` fail-closes zero-execution `--execute`; regression `team-execute-fail-closed.spec.ts`.
followUp: Keep state-only `team start` (no `--execute`) as non-blocking success.
